title: Add AI Boss Chat to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Boss Chat](https://greggelong.github.io/aiBossChat/) to chat
- AI Boss Chat: p dir="auto" style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: rgb(240, 246, 252); font-size: 16px

Fixes #11970

gist.headline: The Boss will see you now
gist.blurb: Step into the corner office! We've just added AI Boss Chat by greggelong to the community Greenhouse.
gist.summary: Added the 'AI Boss Chat' application by greggelong to the community Greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try out the AI Boss Chat app directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: A chunky robot in a business suit sitting at a desk (the 'AI Boss'), with Polly the bee wearing a tiny necktie and holding a clipboard, having a friendly chat. Office setting but cozy and warm.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny necktie and holding a clipboard, having a friendly chat with a chunky robot wearing a business suit sitting behind a wooden desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'BOSS CHAT'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny necktie and holding a clipboard, having a friendly chat with a chunky robot wearing a business suit sitting behind a wooden desk.
